RG

Engineering Leader · E-Commerce · Builder of Great Teams

Richard Gill

07519 878764 richard.gill1986@gmail.com LinkedIn Spotify richardgill.net

16 years. One company. Endless challenges embraced.
Now ready to bring that same energy somewhere new.

→ Embrace the Challenge
16 Years in the game
134 Websites delivered
64 Sites migrated
0 Downtime on migration

Who Is This Guy?

The early riser

4:30am gym sessions before most people have hit snooze. Discipline is a lifestyle, not a phase.

The loyal one

16 years at THG. Not because he had to stay. Because he genuinely cared about the work and the people around him.

The calm in the storm

Migrations, deadlines, audits. Richard is the person teams want in the room when things get complicated.

No relish on this CV. No filler, no padding, no mystery meat. Just the good stuff, delivered hot. ★

01

The Career So Far

May 2025 – Now

Myprotein / THG

Current

Head of Engineering

Leading the team behind one of the world's biggest sports nutrition brands.

  • Managing 4 developers and 2 UX designers, keeping Myprotein.com sharp, fast and converting.
  • Embedded AI tooling into the team's workflow. Same quality, faster delivery.
  • Making decisions led by data. 50+ experiments acorss 36 locales.
  • A team that's driving £20m in projected annual revenue.

Jan 2024 – May 2025

THG

Engineering Manager, Nutrition

Built a fully remote squad from scratch. Delivered a live platform in 3 months.

  • Migrated UK, Germany and Japan (the top 3 revenue locales) with zero downtime.
  • Shipped all 64 Nutrition sites onto a new platform in Q1 2025.
  • Collaborated with PwC on a 6-week design sprint for new MP.com templates. On time, every time.
  • Partnered with CRO and UX on Core Web Vitals improvements across the estate.

May 2021 – Dec 2024

THG

Team of the Year 2021

Engineering Manager

A team of 10. A target of websites. An award at the end of it.

  • 81 websites delivered in 2021 alone, part of a wider two-squad output of 134.
  • Used Jira data to identify sprint efficiency gaps and coach engineers individually.
  • Recruited and onboarded 6 new team members fully remotely.
  • Delivered for Cult Beauty, Berghaus, Kickers, Lyle and Scott and Nuxe, among others.
  • Completed Scrum Master certification while running the team full time.

Mar 2017 – May 2021

THG

Fearless Leadership Award

Tech Lead

Manager, Scrum Master, developer and mentor. Sometimes all in the same afternoon.

  • Led up to 11 engineers across four parallel workstreams.
  • Gradually stepped away from hands-on development to focus fully on people leadership.
  • Regular one-to-ones, performance reviews and a genuine investment in every person on the team.

Oct 2016 – Mar 2017

THG

International Rollout Lead

50+ websites. 28 languages. One very busy quarter.

  • Led THG's push into global markets as part of an aggressive international expansion.
  • Nominated for Tech Employee of the Year. Team nominated for Team of the Year.

2012 – Oct 2016

THG

Front End Web Developer

Joined a team of 8 maintaining 30 sites. Left managing an estate of 100+.

  • Grew with the company through one of its most ambitious scaling phases.

Sept 2007 – Nov 2012

Martin Dawes Systems

UI Designer and Developer

Where it all started. Five years, four job titles, one clear direction of travel.

  • Progressed from Web Designer through the graduate scheme to UI Designer and Developer.
02

What He Brings

Technical

HTML JavaScript Tailwind CSS Astro SQL Google Tag Manager Google Analytics Git AI tooling

Leadership

Certified Scrum Master Agile delivery Jira and workflow Team development 360 feedback Remote team leadership Stakeholder management Recruitment Mentoring
03

What People Say

"

I had the privilege of working alongside Richard during one of THG’s most ambitious platform migrations. Every site. Every deadline. Delivered. What sets Richard apart is not just his tireless work ethic or his ability to stay completely calm under pressure, it is the way he leads. No ego, no politics, just a genuine desire to do great work and bring people with him. He is the kind of person who makes everyone around him better, and that is a rare thing. Without ever seeking the spotlight, Richard has a quiet ability to bring out something better in the people around him. I have seen it first hand. People work harder for Richard, stay longer for Richard and genuinely care about the outcome because he does.

Lucinda Lamb · Former Director · THG

"

Testimonial from a direct report — what it was like being managed by Richard and what they learned. The best ones talk about feeling supported, trusted and developed.

Name · Title · Company

"

Working with Richard under pressure is genuinely one of the biggest strengths of any project team. In CRO, we’re constantly testing ideas at pace, and Richard consistently bridges the gap between UX thinking and rapid technical implementation without compromising quality. He’s incredibly adaptable, solutions-focused, and calm when priorities shift or challenges arise. Whether it’s refining an experiment, overcoming technical blockers, or turning ambitious concepts into reality within tight timelines, Richard always finds a way forward. He’s collaborative, proactive, and someone you can rely on when delivery speed and flexibility matter most.

Matthew Cowey · Senior CRO Manager · Myprotein
